title: critoniopsis quillonensis
intro: Critoniopsis quillonensis, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, is native to the Andes Mountains and is also known as Andean daisy or Critoniopsis. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the body from damage caused by free radicals. The health benefits of Critoniopsis quillonensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its ability to support digestive health and reduce stress. Herbal preparations of Critoniopsis quillonensis can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
